title: spathulopetalum mogadoxense
side_effects: Spathulopetalum mogadoxense can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing nausea and vomiting in some individuals due to its emetic properties. Overuse of this plant can lead to liver damage and increased risk of bleeding due to its potential interaction with blood-thinning medications. Additionally, improper use of Spathulopetalum mogadoxense may also cause allergic reactions, including skin irritation and respiratory issues, in sensitive individuals. In severe cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extracts can lead to seizures and coma, highlighting the importance of proper guidance and caution when using it for medicinal purposes.
